compartments.label: Cytosol
compartments.notes: Shared soluble phase and metabolic field.

compartments.label: Smooth ER
compartments.notes: Lipid metabolism, Ca storage, CYP detox.

definition.notes: Authoritative M015 hepatocyte definition for the integrated engine boundary.

hepatocyte_radius_um.name: hepatocyte_radius_um
hepatocyte_radius_um.notes: Initial coarse radius for visualization and compartment scaling; must be refined per dataset.

initial_pool_unit.name: initial_pool_unit
initial_pool_unit.notes: M015 uses normalized pools until quantitative hepatocyte concentrations are curated.

pools.label: ATP
pools.notes: Energy currency available to ATP-costly processes.

pools.label: Oxygen
pools.notes: Cytosolic oxygen availability for mitochondrial and peroxisomal oxidation.

pools.label: Folded secretory cargo
pools.notes: ER quality-control-passed cargo ready for Golgi processing.

pools.label: Autophagy cargo
pools.notes: Damaged protein/organelle material committed to autophagy.

alberts_mbc.notes: Broad cell biology reference for organelle function and cross-organelle stress responses.
alberts_mbc.title: Molecular Biology of the Cell, NCBI Bookshelf

cell_biology_by_numbers.notes: Quantitative reference for sizes, concentrations, copy numbers, and order-of-magnitude checks.
cell_biology_by_numbers.title: Cell Biology by the Numbers

project_roadmap_07.notes: Project-specific hepatocyte-first engine boundary and stochastic modeling contract.
project_roadmap_07.title: Integrated Cell Engine Roadmap

stochastic_policy.notes: M015 defines the contract; event kinetics are implemented in later process modules.

validation_targets.description: Definition includes sinusoidal and canalicular membrane regions.
Every stochastic event must be described as a hazard tied to cell/organelle state.

events.text: Initialized authoritative hepatocyte definition/state snapshot boundary.
Cargo misfolded_secretory_protein lost on er_quality_control->proteasome: success_probability=0.269, edge_stress=0.032, quality=0.240.
Cargo canalicular_bile_transporter retained on golgi->canalicular_face: success_probability=0.601, edge_stress=0.057, quality=0.900.
Cargo lysosomal_hydrolase retained on er_quality_control->golgi: success_probability=0.602, edge_stress=0.045, quality=0.880.

membrane_state.notes: membrane_ca_brian2_boundary_v1; deterministic ODE fallback used unless Brian2 backend is attached.

metabolic_fluxes.notes: mitochondrial ATP with ROS side load
CYP-like detox consumes redox reserve and adds ROS
